# edit-mode

Sub-plugin of `reorder`. Owns the user-facing edit-mode UI:

- A pen button on `Shell.Toolbar` (group `actions`) that toggles edit mode globally.
- A `Core.Root` contribution that listens for the Escape key and exits edit mode.

This plugin only depends on `@plugins/reorder/web` (for `setEditMode`/`useEditMode`) and `@plugins/shell/web` (for the toolbar slot). It is intentionally separate from the reorder primitive to avoid a cyclic import: shell's `slots.ts` wraps its slots with `Reorder.area`, so reorder cannot itself contribute to shell's slots.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Pen button on the top toolbar that toggles global edit mode for all reorderable slots; Esc exits edit mode.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ActionBar.Item` → `PenButton`, `ActionBar.Item` → `ScopeToggle`, `Core.Root` → `ExitPromptObserver`, `Shortcuts.Shortcut` "reorder.exit-edit-mode (escape)"
  - Uses: `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/shortcuts.defineShortcut`, `primitives/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/status-dot.StatusDot`, `primitives/text.Text`, `primitives/toggle-chip.SegmentedControl`, `primitives/toggle-chip.SegmentedOption`, `primitives/ui-kit.Button`, `primitives/ui-kit.Popover`, `primitives/ui-kit.PopoverContent`, `primitives/ui-kit.PopoverTrigger`, `reorder.getEditMode`, `reorder.ReorderScope`, `reorder.setEditMode`, `reorder.setReorderScope`, `reorder.useEditMode`, `reorder.useReorderScope`, `reorder/staging.useApplyAllReorderDefaults`, `reorder/staging.useDiscardAllStagedDefaults`, `reorder/staging.useHasStagedDefaults`, `shell/action-bar.ActionBar`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
